fields.label: Choose portal
fields.helpText: This SQL dropdown feeds the DataRepeater below.

properties.optionsSql:
SELECT
  CAST(p.PortalID AS nvarchar(20)) AS Value,
  CONCAT('Portal ', p.PortalID, ' / ', COALESCE(NULLIF(pa.HTTPAlias, ''), '(no primary alias)')) AS Label
FROM dbo.Portals p
OUTER APPLY (
  SELECT TOP 1 HTTPAlias
  FROM dbo.PortalAlias
  WHERE PortalID = p.PortalID
  ORDER BY IsPrimary DESC, PortalAliasID
) pa
ORDER BY p.PortalID

widgetProps.masterQuery:
SELECT
  t.TabID,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(t.Title, ''), t.TabName) AS PageTitle,
  t.TabName,
  t.TabPath,
  t.Level,
  CASE WHEN t.IsVisible = 1 THEN 'Visible' ELSE 'Hidden' END AS Visibility,
  moduleStats.ModuleCount
FROM dbo.Tabs t
OUTER APPLY (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS ModuleCount
  FROM dbo.TabModules tm
  JOIN dbo.Modules m ON m.ModuleID = tm.ModuleID
  WHERE tm.TabID = t.TabID
    AND tm.IsDeleted = 0
    AND ISNULL(m.IsDeleted, 0) = 0
) moduleStats
WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0
  AND t.PortalID = COALESCE(TRY_CONVERT(int, NULLIF(:portalId, '')), (SELECT MIN(PortalID) FROM dbo.Portals))
ORDER BY t.Level, t.TabOrder, t.TabID
widgetProps.emptyMessage: Choose a portal to load DNN pages.
widgetProps.detail1Query:
SELECT
  tm.TabModuleID,
  tm.ModuleOrder,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(tm.ModuleTitle, ''), dm.FriendlyName, dm.ModuleName, CONCAT('Module #', tm.ModuleID)) AS ModuleTitle,
  tm.PaneName,
  dm.ModuleName,
  dm.FriendlyName,
  tm.ModuleID
FROM dbo.TabModules tm
JOIN dbo.Modules m ON m.ModuleID = tm.ModuleID
LEFT JOIN dbo.ModuleDefinitions md ON md.ModuleDefID = m.ModuleDefID
LEFT JOIN dbo.DesktopModules dm ON dm.DesktopModuleID = md.DesktopModuleID
WHERE tm.TabID = TRY_CONVERT(int, :parentId)
  AND tm.IsDeleted = 0
  AND ISNULL(m.IsDeleted, 0) = 0
ORDER BY tm.ModuleOrder, tm.TabModuleID

detailLevels.query:
SELECT
  tm.TabModuleID,
  tm.ModuleOrder,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(tm.ModuleTitle, ''), dm.FriendlyName, dm.ModuleName, CONCAT('Module #', tm.ModuleID)) AS ModuleTitle,
  tm.PaneName,
  dm.ModuleName,
  dm.FriendlyName,
  tm.ModuleID
FROM dbo.TabModules tm
JOIN dbo.Modules m ON m.ModuleID = tm.ModuleID
LEFT JOIN dbo.ModuleDefinitions md ON md.ModuleDefID = m.ModuleDefID
LEFT JOIN dbo.DesktopModules dm ON dm.DesktopModuleID = md.DesktopModuleID
WHERE tm.TabID = TRY_CONVERT(int, :parentId)
  AND tm.IsDeleted = 0
  AND ISNULL(m.IsDeleted, 0) = 0
ORDER BY tm.ModuleOrder, tm.TabModuleID

_template.name: DNN Portal Tabs Cascade Demo
_template.description: SQL dropdown portal selector cascades into a DataRepeater that lists DNN Tabs and lets you drill into page modules. Uses DashboardDatabase and showcases query-string plus form-field parameter binding into DataRepeater SQL.
_template.author: MegaForm built-in sample
